query: DELETE FROM atolls WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT a.id FROM atolls a LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON a.name = ig.atoll WHERE a.name IN (SELECT name FROM atolls GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AND ig.id IS NULL LIMIT 2) AS subquery);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute DELETE FROM atolls WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT a.id FROM atolls a LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON a.name = ig.atoll WHERE a.name IN (SELECT name FROM atolls GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AND ig.id IS NULL LIMIT 2) AS subquery);
